queries.name: Server logs in a time range
queries.description: {from:DateTime} is required (drives the Dashboard's global From filter, and accepts a relative expression like -1h/now-7d). to/level/logger/message are wrapped in /*[ ... ]*/ optional blocks, so they're non-required: blank ones drop out of the query entirely, filling one in adds its predicate. level renders as a dropdown (declared Enum8 member names); logger/message use positionCaseInsensitive(...) > 0 for a plain case-insensitive substring search — no ILIKE wildcard footgun if the search term itself contains a literal % or _.
